Along with Jhin, Iska and Mismis, they make up the members of the 907th unit with her specialty being able to graph coordinates of her target to a machine and releasing out projectiles to her enemies. She is a cheerful and high spirited girl that will help her teammates even if they go into such troubles, such as when Mismis became an Astral Mage after being exposed to a spirit vortex. name: Rei Ichinose
description: **Height:** 160 cm (5'3") Rei Ichinose is a member of the Hoshimi Production group Sunny Peace. She is a student at Uruha Girls' Private School's high school division and her image color is light blue. Rei is a cool, dance-loving high schooler in her third year. She has a strong desire to improve and hates to lose more than most people. name: Reina
description: Also known as Crimson Reina, she is a mage specializing in fire magic. She was born to a travelling merchant, and became a hunter at an early age, giving her the most practical knowledge and experience amongst the Crimson Vow party members. She has a signature fire spell called Crimson Hellfire. name: Ren
description: Aoba's All-Mate, an all purpose computer that can take various forms. Aoba considers him a dear companion and personally maintains him. They've been together for as long as Aoba can remember. His breed is a Japanese Spitz.

name: Sayumi Takanashi
description: She is a senior student and the president of the Literature Club. She is normally seen reading books, and there are hints that she has feelings for Andou. Her power is "Root of Origins" in which anyone she touches returns to his or her original state, although the exact nature of this remains vague. She a very refine girl, whose other hobbies, besides reading, includes ikebana, origami, and martial arts. For some reason, she dislikes being called "cute." (Source: Zince-View, edited)

description: Lives together with Shijima as something of a parent figure. She quit university and is currently focusing on some sort of incomprehensible research.

name: Takumi Kijima
description: A male student who confesses his feelings for Ao. Ao calls him “The Normie King.” Takumi is athletic and handsome. Ao thinks he’s a sexually experienced stud just trying to get in her panties, but he genuinely likes her. Because of this, he’s often nervous when they see each other. He is unaware that Ao’s father is a famous erotic author.

name: Tomoko Nomura
description: A student in Eikichi Onizuka's class, Tomoko Nomura has a large chest (her cup size is F), but is not too bright, leading to people calling her Toro-ko (Toro meaning "slow" in Japanese; she is nicknamed Slo-mo-ko in the English version). After initially messing up her role in one of Miyabi Aizawa's plans to get Onizuka fired, she is cut off from Miyabi's group. name: Ultima
description: Ultima, the Purple Primordial, was one of the Demons recruited by Diablo to serve Rimuru. Originally she was an Arch Demon, but being named by Rimuru evolved her into a Demon Peer. ~!She later evolves into a True Demon Lord.!~

name: Aizou Shibasaki
description: Aizo Shibasaki, also known by his stage name Aizo, is a character featured in Confession Executive Committee, a primary character of the Idol Series, and member of [LIP×LIP](https://anilist.co/staff/147796/LipxLip). description: She is a second-year student in attendance at Hachimitsu Academy and also the love interest of Shingo Wakamoto. ~!Anzu was a member of the Underground Student Council who worked as Captain of the Guards under its president.!~
